productDisplayName: W Women Thread Work Purple Kurta
description: Composition Purple kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a slit neckline, thread work and metal embellishments on the chest, thread work above the hemline Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this retro-style piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 26"
